recommendations.title: Rebel in the Rye
recommendations.overview: The life of celebrated but reclusive author J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel The Catcher in the Rye.

recommendations.title: It's Complicated

recommendations.title: Try Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Teenager Jones has opted not to go to college and is instead renting a room in a boarding house to work on his writing skills. Soon, Jones finds himself dividing his time between two women: a young actress named Lisa and a photographer named Jane. Af

recommendations.title: Croupier
recommendations.overview: Jack Manfred is an aspiring writer who to make ends meet, takes a job as a croupier. Jack remains an observer, knowing that everything in life is a gamble and that gamblers are born to lose. Inevitably, he gets sucked into the world of the casino whi

recommendations.title: Sex and Lucía
recommendations.overview: Various lives converge on an isolated island, all connected by an author whose novel has become inextricably entwined with his own life.

recommendations.title: Gabriel's Inferno: Part III
recommendations.overview: The final part of the film adaption of the erotic romance novel Gabriel's Inferno written by an anonymous Canadian author under the pen name Sylvain Reynard.

recommendations.title: Out of Africa
recommendations.overview: Tells the life story of Danish author Karen Blixen, who at the beginning of the 20th century moved to Africa to build a new life for herself. The film is based on her 1937 autobiographical novel.

recommendations.title: A Writer's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: Lu Kongwen is the author of a fantasy novel series following a heroic teenager, also named Kongwen, on a quest to end the tyrannical rule of Lord Redmane, under the guidance of a Black Armor. But through a strange twist of fate, the fantasy world of

recommendations.title: The Man Who Loved Women
recommendations.overview: At Bertrand Morane's burial there are many of the women that the 40-year-old engineer loved. In flashback Bertrand's life and love affairs are told by himself while writing an autobiographical novel.

recommendations.title: Am I OK?
